name: Mom's Basic White Bread (Dak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the yeast to one side of the inner pan.
2. Add the remaining ingredients in the order given.
3. Select white bread and turn off "start".
4. Enjoy waiting for this perfect golden brown loaf to be ready to eat.
Warning: A truly universal favorite in our home. It smells just as good as when Mom used to make it. It's not only better than store-bought, but it's totally preservative-free.
